title: Shoei TC-10 Anthracite

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Fiberglass Composite Shell

technical_analysis: The Shoei TC-10 utilizes a proprietary Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) layer integrated directly into the liner structure, allowing for rotational movement during oblique impacts to reduce energy transfer to the brain. The shell construction employs a high-strength fiberglass composite that offers superior impact resistance compared to standard polycarbonate while maintaining an aerodynamic profile optimized for high-speed stability. Internal geometry features a precise Intermediate Oval shape with adjustable retention systems that distribute pressure evenly across the occipital and frontal regions.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of safety and style with the Shoei TC-10 in Anthracite, a helmet engineered for riders who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing performance. Its sleek, aggressive design cuts through the wind while the advanced MIPS technology provides an extra layer of defense against rotational forces, ensuring peace of mind on every ride.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Shoei TC-10 Anthracite full-face helmet featuring MIPS technology, DOT and ECE certification, and premium aerodynamics. Shop now for ultimate riding safety.
